title: coluteastrum benguellense
intro: Coluteastrum benguellense, also known as Benguella or African fire, is a plant species that belongs to the family Fabaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Coluteastrum benguellense are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and skin infections.
